triage_rows.key_reason: The control line produced no material external or chronology gain and should be killed without killing the parent family.
The control remains same-family carving with unchanged balanced accuracy, so the subline should stop even if the family stays candidate-only.
The branch-level hardening did not improve the weak chronology bucket, so more same-family control work would be tunnel behavior.
V118X control_helpful=False, V118Y best_bal_acc=0.727273, V118Z mean_test_bal_acc=0.597222.

interpretation: V1.19A freezes the XYZ hardening cycle so the project does not keep spending budget on a same-family false-positive control that changed almost nothing.
The key distinction is explicit: the false-positive control branch is dead, while the parent sustained-participation non-chase family remains candidate-only from V1.18W.
The next cycle must not revisit this prior-heat/late-fade control unless a genuinely orthogonal hardening idea appears.
